demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I bent over to pick up my slipper, felt a massive crunch in my spine, and now the pain is so deep and agonizing I cannot move my legs to stand.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The back pain came on suddenly an hour ago after I bent over, and it is so severe I can't get up or walk at all.

symptom_narrative.onset: the sharp spine pain started about an hour ago, right after I bent over to pick up a slipper
symptom_narrative.duration: the deep back and rib pain has been building over the past month; the sudden severe spine pain is one hour old
symptom_narrative.character: a deep, dull, gnawing ache in my lower back and ribs that turned into a sudden sharp crunching pain
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst pain I have ever had — I can't move at all
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low in my back and around my lower ribs
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the background ache has been constant and getting worse; the sharp pain has been constant since it started
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — I took two paracetamol an hour ago and it did absolutely nothing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any attempt to move, sit up or turn
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've been completely wiped out and feeling unwell for months, I've lost about 5 kilos without trying, and my wee has looked frothy
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no injury like this before, but the deep bone ache has crept up over the last few weeks
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck flat on the floor/bed and can't transfer or walk; I live alone and can't reach the bathroom or a phone if I fall

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I've had pneumonia twice already this year and needed antibiotics both times

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: took two tablets about an hour ago

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; worried about being unable to reach the bathroom or telephone if dropped

objective_data_offered.value: I've noticed a lot of new bruises on both my forearms that I don't remember knocking
on camera the patient looks very pale and washed out, lying flat and unwilling to move
my wee has looked frothy and bubbly the last little while
